notes.unset_command_policy: An empty command string is an improvement opportunity, not proof of failure unless required for the selected validation tier.
notes.signal_policy: Empty observe, smoke, arch, security, or codeql commands are signal/back-pressure gaps to consider when the agent or reviewer had to infer what the harness should prove.
notes.safety: Long-running boot is locked down by default: 'run' requires --execute to actually spawn the process; 'validate' never invokes 'run' under any tier.
